uows.rationale: Preconditions check: verify files, produce artifact_schema.yaml; blocks implementation if missing

execution_schedule.batch_rationale: Precondition and verification must run first to avoid wasted implementation work

uows.rationale: Design and component specification; decide empty-state token and component API before implementation

execution_schedule.batch_rationale: Design/spec must precede implementation to reduce rework

uows.rationale: Implementation of component, template, locators, and harness; highest implementation risk

execution_schedule.batch_rationale: Implementation requires focused work and coordination; serialize to simplify reviews

uows.rationale: State wiring and integration; reduces test flakiness by ensuring signals are provided

execution_schedule.batch_rationale: Integration changes may affect implementation; run before test/build verification

uows.rationale: Tests & build verification: validate implementation via CI-like checks and capture CLI outputs
Edge-case tests, accessibility & i18n checks that complement T5; expected to modify test harness or spec files only

execution_schedule.batch_rationale: T5 and T6 primarily add/modify tests and checks and can proceed in parallel with coordination; risk minimized if harness changes from T3/T5 are stabilized

uows.rationale: Docs, impl_report & handoff after tests and evidence collected

execution_schedule.batch_rationale: Documentation and handoff require completed test/build evidence

risk_ordered_items.risk_reason: Missing or mismatched target files that block implementation (SE-EXEC-REPO-MISMATCH-BLOCK)
Complex implementation touching component, template and harness; highest chance of regressions and adjacent import edits
Tests & build verification may fail if wiring or module imports are incorrect; exposes integration regressions

batch_5.safety_rationale: T5 and T6 primarily modify tests and checks (separate test files/harness assertions). Parallelization is allowed if T3 stabilizes harness helpers and authors coordinate to avoid touching the same files.

metacognitive_context.decision_rationale: A serial flow up through implementation de-risks early (T1-T3). After wiring (T4), tests and edge-case checks (T5/T6) can run with limited overlap to speed validation. Conservatism chosen where file-dependency knowledge is missing.

alternatives_discarded.approach: Aggressive parallelization of implementation and wiring
alternatives_discarded.reason_rejected: High risk of merge conflicts and failing builds given missing file-dependency mappings
Violates precondition checks and increases rework risk

knowledge_gaps: Exact file paths and repository path ambiguity (tilde '~' usage) remain unresolved until T1 completes.
Concrete service or input source for specimen counts (affects T4 wiring) is unknown.
OpenViking lessons retrieval was limited by API access; no auto-derived file-dependency map available.

tool_anomalies.anomaly: Authorization/401 error during librarian retrieval; fallbacks used
